text: The elder: To the elect <sup>ⓘ</sup> lady and her children, whom I love in the truth — and not only I, but also all who know the truth <sup>ⓙ</sup>  —
because of the truth that remains in us <sup>ⓚ</sup> and will be with us forever.
Grace, mercy, and peace <sup>ⓛ</sup> will be with us from God the Father and from Jesus Christ, the Son <sup>ⓜ</sup> of the Father, in truth and love. <sup>ⓝ</sup>
I was very glad to find some of your children walking in truth, <sup>ⓐ</sup> in keeping with a command we have received from the Father.
So now I ask you, dear lady — not as if I were writing you a new command, but one we have had from the beginning — that we love one another. <sup>ⓑ</sup>
This is love: <sup>ⓒ</sup> that we walk according to his commands. <sup>ⓓ</sup> This is the command as you have heard it from the beginning: that you walk in love. <sup>[1]</sup>
Many deceivers have gone out into the world; they do not confess the coming of Jesus Christ in the flesh. <sup>ⓔ</sup> This is the deceiver and the antichrist. <sup>ⓕ</sup>
Watch yourselves so you don’t lose what we <sup>[2]</sup> have worked for, but that you may receive a full reward. <sup>ⓖ</sup>

Anyone who does not remain in Christ’s teaching <sup>ⓗ</sup> but goes beyond it does not have God. <sup>ⓘ</sup> The one who remains <sup>ⓙ</sup> in that teaching, this one has both the Father <sup>ⓚ</sup> and the Son. <sup>ⓛ</sup>
If anyone comes to you and does not bring this teaching, do not receive <sup>ⓜ</sup> him into your home, and don’t greet him;
for the one who greets him shares <sup>ⓝ</sup> in his evil works. <sup>ⓐ</sup>
Though I have many things to write to you, <sup>ⓑ</sup> I don’t want to use paper and ink. Instead, I hope to come to you and talk face to face so that our joy <sup>ⓒ</sup> may be complete.
The children of your elect sister send you greetings.
